seasonal.subtitle: Manage seasonal periods, zone activation and capacity overrides
seasonal.name: Name
seasonal.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. Terrace open during summer months
seasonal.activatedZonesHint: Which zones become active during this season
seasonal.capacityOverrideHint: Override the default capacity for this season (empty = use default)
seasonal.perServiceCapacityHint: Override capacity per service for this season. Empty = use default.
seasonal.autoActivateHint: Automatically activate this season when the start date is reached
seasonal.activeNowHint: Toggle this season on or off immediately
seasonal.emptyHint: Add a season to automatically activate zones and adjust capacity, e.g. a summer terrace or holiday schedule.
seasonal.errorDateRequired: Start and end date are required
seasonal.errorDateOrder: Start date must be before end date
seasonal.errorOverlap: Overlaps with season '{{name}}'. Please choose different dates.
seasonal.infoNote: Seasonal settings determine which zones are available and how many guests can be booked per period. Combine with opening hours for maximum control.

reviewRequests.title: Review Requests
reviewRequests.subtitle: Automatically send a review request to guests after each visit
reviewRequests.enableToggleDesc: Enable to automatically send a message asking guests to leave a review after their visit
reviewRequests.delayDesc: Choose when the request is sent after the end of the visit
reviewRequests.messageDesc: Text received by the guest. Use {{guest_name}} and {{restaurant_name}} as dynamic variables.
reviewRequests.messagePlaceholder: Dear {{guest_name}}, thank you for visiting {{restaurant_name}}! Would you take a moment to share your experience?
reviewRequests.disabledNote: Review requests require email activation. You can configure the settings in advance.
